query.text:
declare @unit varchar(128), @c varchar(64), @m varchar(64), @i varchar(64), @expression varchar(64), @increase varchar(64), @tag varchar(64), @e nvarchar(511), @controller varchar(128) declare @f varchar(1024), @join nvarchar(1024)
select @ma_ct = replace(@ma_ct, '''', '') select @e = case when exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_delete_log' and val = '1') then 'status <> ''*''' else '' end select @c = rtrim(a.c$) + case when right(a.c$, 1) = '$' then '000000' else '' end, @m = rtrim(a.m$), @i = rtrim(a.i$), @controller = b.sysid from dmct9 a join @@sysDatabaseName..wcommand b on a.ma_ct = b.syscode where a.ma_ct = @ma_ct and b.syscode <> '' if right(@m, 1) = '$' select @expression = 'convert(char(6), {0}, 112)', @increase = 'dateadd(month, 1, {0})', @tag = '000000' else select @expression = '''''', @increase = '{0}', @tag = '' if exists(select 1 from dmttct where ma_ct = @ma_ct) select @f = 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,ma_nt,isnull(a.status, ''''),isnull(b.statusname, '''') u0', @join = 'a left join dmttct b on a.status = b.status where b.ma_ct = ''' + @ma_ct + '''' else select @f = 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,ma_nt,'''',''''', @join = ''
select @unit = case when @ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @ma_dvcs end
&FilterInitialize;
exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @ma_ct, @c, @m, @i, 'ngay_ct', @expression, @increase, @tag, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, '', '', 'stt_rec', 'so_ct,stt_rec,ngay_ct,ma_nt,status', @f, @join, 'ngay_ct, so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct, @ngay_ct, '', '', '*', '0', @unit, 0, 0, @e, default, default, default, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
